Terms from 4th Amendment (2023-07-21), copier scan 20260612182518911. Original lease 2010-03-30 (Suites 101+201, 7,062 SF); right-sized to 2,500 SF. Current term to 2027-03-31; rent $4,375 (24)/$4,506.25 (25)/$4,641.43 (26). Two 3-yr renewal options; first-renewal notice by 2026-09-30. Active renewal RFP (Stirling/Cresa) for 5-yr term from 2027-04-01.
Terms populated from lease doc (Lease, 2025-01-17); auto-renew & notice not confirmed.
Auto-renewed for an additional 12-month term per lease; 3% escalation effective 2026-08-01, new monthly rent $2,007.32. Renewal reminder sent to Gary Thomas, CPA (2026-06).
Terms populated from lease doc (Lease, 2024-10-14); auto-renew & notice not confirmed. Termination rolled forward 1y from 2025-10-14 (annual renewal assumed).

Terms from Amendment #6 (dated 2025-06-06), copier scan 20260612170644053.pdf. Original lease 2005-10-01; extended via Amd #1-6 to 2029-09-30. Rent $4,213.62 (fixed thru Sep 2026 per Amd #5), then per Amd #6: $4,213.62 (Oct 2026) / $4,318.12 (Oct 2027) / $4,423.87 (Oct 2028). Two 5-yr renewal options at 2% (3-mo notice). Broker Jack Sikora, CBRE.

Terms from Amendment #6 (dated 2026-03-18), copier scan (4 Your Eyes Amd #6 signed). Original lease 2006-05-01; expanded to 302-A (2007) and 302B (Amd #6). Rent $4,304.39 eff 2026-04-01 (302-A+303 $3,724.95 + 302B $579.44); term to 2027-03-31; auto-renews 3-mo unless 90-day notice; 3% annual (April). Corrects prior rolled-forward 2026-12-31 estimate.

Terms from Renewal Notice (2025-06-11) + Amendment #1 (2018-12-28), copier scans 20260612165818987 / 20260612165833496. Init 2017-06-15 ($750). Auto-renews 12-mo each June 14 unless 90-day notice; 3% annual (June). Documented term to 2026-06-13 @ $922.40; auto-renews 2026-06-14 to $950.07 (rent-roll value) through 2027-06-13.
Terms populated from lease doc (Lease, 2024-01-06); auto-renew & notice not confirmed.

Terms from Amendment #2 (dated 2025-09-03), copier scan 20260612163102668.pdf. Init lease 2021-03-01 ($2,816.66) → Amd#1 2023 (to 2026-02-28, $3,077.83) → Amd#2 2025 (to 2029-02-28, $3,265.00 eff 2026-03-01). 3% annual (March). Renewal option exhausted; no auto-renew. Prior rent-roll figure was $3,265.27.

TERMINATING: Notice to vacate (Arthur J. Gallagher & Co., 2026-05-27) — tenant vacates Suite 206 on 2026-06-30; rent paid through that date. Security deposit $3,106.50 refundable to tenant by 2026-06-30. Lease commenced 2025-07-01 (AMD3 terms). Banking/wire details kept out of the public record.

Terms from Amendment #1 (dated 2025-05-23), copier scan 20260612162826701.pdf. Init 2023-09-01 (24mo @ $2,625) → Amd#1 extends to 2027-08-31 @ $2,784.86 eff 2025-09-01, +3%/yr (Sept). Auto-renews successive 12-mo terms unless either party gives 90-day written notice (deadline ~2027-06-02).

Current term from 2025-07-18 amendment (2nd renewal). Lineage now on file: Init 2023-11-03 ($1,760, 12mo) → 1st renewal 2024-06-24 (to 2025-10-31, $1,812.80) → current 2025-11-01..2026-10-31 ($1,867.18). 3% annual (Nov); 1-yr renewals with 60-day notice. Full-service gross.

Terms from Amendment #1 to Lease (dated 2025-12-08), copier scan 20260612143947286.pdf. Original commencement 2021-03-01; extended 2 yrs to 2028-02-28; rent $2,144.65 eff. 2026-03-01; 3% annual escalation (each March); tenant option for one more 2-yr term with 6 months' written notice.
Terms populated from lease doc (Init, 2024-10-23); auto-renew & notice not confirmed.

Terms from Amendment #6 (2024-08-08), copier scan 20260612183008811. Original lease 2004-12-01 (Suite 301, 6,500 SF); grew to Suites 101+102+301 (13,455 SF). Current term to 2029-11-30; rent $26,761.42 eff 2024-12-01, now $27,564.26 after the Dec-2025 3% step; 3% annual (Dec); one 5-yr option (6-mo notice). $1/SF TI allowance.

Suite 201 (6,930 RSF), Building #3. Amendment #6 (2024-09-06): term to 2030-05-31, $13,282.50/mo eff 2025-03-01, 3% each Mar 1, abate Mar 25/26/27, TI $28,245.12, 2×5yr options. Rent reflects Mar-2026 step.

Suite 305, Building #4. Auto-renewing 12-month lease (Amendment #3, 2024-02-06: $996.56/mo eff 2024-05-01, 3% annual escalation each May, 90-day non-renewal notice). Auto-renewal CONFIRMED for the active 2026-05-01 → 2027-04-30 term at $1,057.26/mo (prior $1,026.47 + 3%); next non-renewal notice deadline 2027-01-30. Tenant notified by email 2026-05-19 (SENT); May 2026 payment received at prior rate, $30.79 short — to be collected with June rent. AMD#3 is the doc of record; auto-renewal generated no new executed document.
Suite 200 (2,350 RSF), Building #4. Lease (2022-08-30): $4,210.41/mo, 2% esc each Jan from 2024, 2×36mo options, Beau Box 4%. Rent reflects Jan-2026 step.

Terms from Amendment #3 (2026-05-22, signed), copier scan '2026 Crosby lease-signed copy'. Original commencement 2021-07-01 (Suites 101 & 201, 11,850 SF). Extended to 2028-06-30; rent $20,832.51/mo eff 2026-07-01 (3% over prior $20,225.74); 3% annual (July); one 2-year renewal option.

Terms from Amendment #1 (2026-06-02). Original lease 2025-05-01. Effective 2026-06-01 converted to a 90-day auto-renewing term; rent increased to $1,416.25/mo (3% over prior $1,375), 3% annual escalation continues. terminates reflects the current 90-day cycle end (rolls forward automatically).
Suite 304 (2,640 RSF cumulative), Building #4. Amendment #2 (2024-11-06): +860 SF, $5,220.91/mo eff 2025-04-01, term to 2028-12-31, 3% esc. Rent reflects current escalation.

Suite 301, Building #4 (Floor 3, 1,765 SF). Lessee Detox Management Company, LLC (signatory Roy Viger, CEO; PO Box 53038, Lafayette, LA 70506). Executed 2025-06-27; 3-year primary term 2025-08-01 → 2028-07-31, full-service gross (Lessor pays all utilities; no CAM or real-estate taxes). Rent: Yr1 $3,000, Yr2 $3,105, Yr3 $3,213.67 — 3.5% annual escalation each Aug 1, applies to any renewal. Tenant option to renew ONE additional 2-year term with 60-day written notice (NOT auto-renew); noticeDeadline reflects that renewal-option deadline. Security deposit waived; General Office use. Offer was contingent on relocating the Building #2, Suite 203 tenant. Same tenant also leases Building #1, Suite 307/303B.

Suite 300 (6,507 RSF), Building #5. Amendment #1 (2025-09-29): substitute lessee Audubon Engineering Company, LP → Audubon Companies, LLC (merger eff 2026-01-01), $10,834.63/mo eff 2025-12-01, term to 2030-11-30, 3% esc, 2×2yr options. Rent reflects current term.

Suites 101 & 202 (7,385 RSF), Building #5. Lease (2022-04-15): $12,923/mo base, 1.5% annual escalation commencing the first month of the second lease year (each August); 5-yr term 2022-08-01 → 2027-07-30, full-service gross. Two tenant options to renew, each 36 months, 90-day written notice (not auto-renew); noticeDeadline reflects that renewal-option deadline (90 days before 2027-07-30). Security deposit waived; lease was contingent on relocating the prior 5 Sanctuary Suite 102 tenant. monthlyRent reflects current escalation. Escalation month confirmed from executed lease (transcribed HTML on file). COI on file expired 2026-01-17 — request renewal.

Suite 103 (1,830 RSF), Building #5. Original lease (2022-03-18) $3,001/mo; Amendment #1 (2025-04-23): $3,279.27/mo eff 2025-07-01, term to 2028-06-30, 3% esc, 1×3yr option. Rent reflects current term.

Suite 201 (4,845 RSF), Building #5. Amendment #1 (2024-11-20): $6,963.64/mo eff 2025-01-01, +1,095 SF on 2025-07-15 → $8,997.03/mo, term to 2027-12-31, 2% esc, auto-renews. Rent reflects Jan-2026 step. COI on file expired 2023-08-01 — request renewal.
